error.notTokenError: The AGENT failed to load SKILL related resources correctly. Please retrieve the default Prompt via the cui_get_core_manual tool. In subsequent conversations, please save the token ({{token}}) in the context for use.
error.toolAlreadyExistError: Tool {{toolName}} already exists, please use another name.
error.downloadAssetsFail: Failed to download network resources, HTTP status code: {{status}}
error.fileNotExistError: Local file does not exist, please check if the path is correct: ${fileSource}
error.getWorkflowFormatError: workflowName must end with .json. Current workflowName is: {{workflowName}}
error.notFoundModel: Corresponding model information not found. Currently available models are: {{models}}

cui_get_core_manual.title: Get project core manual
cui_get_core_manual.description: High-priority resource. Must be read first during initialization or when involving tool calls. Contains core protocols, error handling, and parameter population strategies.
cui_get_core_manual.success: Core manual loaded. Please strictly follow the protocols and parameter strategies within it for subsequent operations.

cui_get_workflows_catalog.title: Get workflows catalog
cui_get_workflows_catalog.description: Respond to ComfyUI requirements (e.g., 'draw a picture'). Retrieve the best matching workflow. Guessing IDs or names is strictly prohibited; must be based on search results.

inputSchema.maxItems: Maximum number of items per page in paginated queries of historical tasks.
inputSchema.token: The token obtained after executing the `generateToken.ts` script once the AGENT has successfully loaded the SKILL.
inputSchema.enableWorkflow: Whether to retrieve the user's workflow information.

cui_get_workflows_catalog.success: Workflow catalog retrieved. Please select the best match strictly based on the results. Guessing IDs or names is prohibited.

cui_get_workflow_API.title: Get workflow details
cui_get_workflow_API.description: Used to handle complex workflows or execution errors. Parse the specific meaning and format constraints of parameters via the returned JSON Schema.

inputSchema.workflowName: Target workflow name (prioritize the workflowName field in the catalog; if unavailable, use the name field and append .json to it).

cui_get_workflow_API.success: Workflow definition retrieved. Please use the returned JSON Schema to accurately parse parameter semantics and strictly abide by format constraints.

cui_get_task_detail.title: Get task details by prompt_id
cui_get_task_detail.description: Retrieve task details based on prompt_id, including prompt, outputs, status, meta, and other contents.

inputSchema.promptId: The unique ID of a single workflow execution task.

cui_get_task_detail.success: Workflow definition retrieved. Please use the returned JSON Schema to accurately parse parameter semantics and strictly abide by format constraints.

cui_mount_dynamic_tool.title: Mount dynamic tool
cui_mount_dynamic_tool.description: Used to dynamically generate dedicated workflow execution functions. Stop generation immediately after a successful call. Wait for the Host to refresh the context, then call the newly generated cui_execute_dynamic_task_{workflow_name} in the next conversation turn.

inputSchema.promptId: The unique ID of a single workflow execution task.
inputSchema.toolName: Unique tool suffix name (pure English, e.g., flux_dev), used to generate the tool name cui_execute_dynamic_task_{workflow_name}. Can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.
inputSchema.title: Optional, the display title of the Tool.
inputSchema.description: Optional, the detailed description of the Tool.

cui_execute_dynamic_tool.title: Execute workflow task (dynamically built tool function)
cui_execute_dynamic_tool.description: Dedicated tool to execute {workflow_name}. Only populate user-visible parameters. Map accurately, inventing fields is prohibited.

inputSchema.toolName: Dedicated tool to execute {workflow_name}. Only populate user-visible parameters. Map accurately, inventing fields is prohibited.
inputSchema.isAsync: Whether to execute the task asynchronously. Default is false. Change to true only when explicitly requested by the user.
inputSchema.params: Parameters to modify. Key format is nodeId_inputKey. Unprovided parameters will use default values.

cui_execute_dynamic_tool.asyncSupplement: Asynchronous execution selected. Please ask the user to manually visit ComfyUI to check the results after a while. Conversation ends.

cui_execute_custom_workflow.title: Execute custom workflow
cui_execute_custom_workflow.description: Restricted tool. Used only for explicitly requested low-level debugging or generation without preset workflow API. Prohibited for normal tasks.

inputSchema.apiJson: Complete ComfyUI Prompt format JSON string.
inputSchema.isAsync: Whether to execute the task asynchronously. Default is false. Change to true only when explicitly requested by the user.

cui_execute_custom_workflow.success: Task ({{workflowName}}) successfully added to the task queue (ID: {{promptId}}). Please monitor the progress or wait for the results to be generated.

inputSchema.promptId: The unique ID of a single workflow execution task.

cui_get_task_result.title: Get task result
cui_get_task_result.description: Query task status. If running: report progress and keep waiting. If success: display metadata and media links from the output field.

inputSchema.promptId: The unique ID of a single workflow execution task.

cui_get_task_result.success: Task status retrieved. Please report progress or display the final generated media resources based on the returned results.

cui_list_models.title: Retrieve model files
cui_list_models.description: List available models. Mandatory rule: Before filling in parameters like ckpt_name, you must call this tool to get the exact file name. Guessing or inventing names is strictly prohibited.
cui_list_models.success: Available models list retrieved. Please strictly reference the returned exact file names when filling in parameters; guessing is prohibited.
cui_list_models.successButNoModel: Available model types exist, but no models are available under the selected model type. Please verify that the model file has been uploaded correctly or try using a different model type.

cui_upload_assets.title: Import ComfyUI assets
cui_upload_assets.description: Call this tool to upload and process an image when the user provides a local path or a network link.

inputSchema.fileSource: Local absolute path or network URL link (http/https) of the image.

cui_upload_assets.success: Image: {{finalFileName}} has been successfully imported into ComfyUI Assets.
